summary: Russian forces used cluster bombs and FAB-500 bombs with UMPC targeting Ukrainian UAV control points near Maryevka and airfields in Shevchenko. A Russian drone-interceptor "Lis-2" with automatic target capture was highlighted, alongside Poland’s plan to convert PZL M28 Skytruck into a drone "gunship." Ukraine’s 34th Marine Brigade destroyed a Russian assault group crossing from Oleshky using drops and FPV drones. Russian forces engaged Ukrainian drones with the "Yolka" anti-drone system over 1.5 km away, and FPV drones with artillery destroyed a Ukrainian UAV control post in Kostiantynivka. The "Rubikon" center reported eliminating Ukrainian personnel, UAVs, and a Patriot battery. Russian FPV drones destroyed Ukrainian BMP-1LB and a pickup truck on the Kupyansk direction, while fiber-optic drones burned a Ukrainian BTS-4 armored tractor in Sumy. China’s ATLASS combat swarm system, deploying 96 strike drones from two platforms, was noted as under development. In Lebanon, Hezbollah released footage of an FPV drone striking an Israeli Merkava tank.
